detaileddescription.para:
Creates an empty Trie
f
a functor that will be used to obtain a child of a branch node by its index. Most useful if Trie grows too big to occupy main memory and is stored on an external storage

simplesect.para: the root node of the trie

a node which is a descendant of
parent found by following
key_nibbles

a sequence of nodes in between
parent and the node found by following
key_nibbles. The parent is included, the end node isn't.

detaileddescription.para: Remove all entries, which key starts with the prefix

simplesect.para: result containing void if put successful, error otherwise

briefdescription.para: Returns true if given key-value binding exists in the storage.

simplesect.para: true if key has value, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns true if the storage is empty.

simplesect.para: a child node pointer of a provided parent node at the given index
